an Erudin Emissary  

Monster
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded April 26th, 2014 by wiscookie
Updated April 28th, 2014

Category: EverQuest

Level: 21
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2019-05-04 22:14:20
Known Loot:
Emissary Head

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Quests:
  First Test of Kejaar

Report a correction

Post Comment
Faction hits for kill
QuoteReply
# Jun 17 2016 at 12:44 PM Rating: Good
drool
1,563 posts
I guess they were moved to no faction? No hits for kill and for at least my chars conned indiff.
▲ Page top
How often?
QuoteReply
# Sep 23 2002 at 3:46 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591778257529
28 posts
Anyone have an idea how often they drop heads? I've killed around 4-5 and haven't seen a head yet.

Thanks,
Davril
24 Druid
Quellious
▲ Page top
Spawn Time
QuoteReply
# Feb 24 2002 at 2:14 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Does anybody know how fast these guys spawn? I want to know because I am gonna butcher enough to be able to do the razortooth quest in kerra isle.
thank you.
▲ Page top
she needs to die
QuoteReply
# Oct 16 2001 at 12:28 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
i hate this ***** she has stole half of my kills when soloign yellows the only time she hasn't stole any kills is when i fight greens

when i'm big im gonna kill her and a kill her a lot
▲ Page top
Basic Info
QuoteReply
# Jul 29 2001 at 6:51 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591756701976
57 posts
Ok here's what i know about them from 3 days of hunting for faction:
they are almost always 21 but will sometimes be 20. spawn point seems to be close to erudin, and they will run to there if severely wounded. drop the occasional piece of ringmail and bronze weapons about half the time. faction hits are:
-highcounciloferudin
-highguardoferudin
+heretics
-merchantsoferudin
+kerra
head is for a kerra isle quest. only mob i know of that will raise kerra faction.
▲ Page top
Faction
QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2001 at 3:42 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Just wanted to point out this isn't the only quest to give kerra faction, the quest for a sharptooth gives you +kerra and no negatives.
▲ Page top
Spawn point?
QuoteReply
# Jul 13 2001 at 1:10 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Anyone have any idea where he emmisaries spawn points are? Or even an approximate area they wander? Which side of the river? We know their level now let's get onto the good info, eh?
▲ Page top
RE: Spawn point?
QuoteReply
# Oct 27 2001 at 1:17 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I've seen them walking all over from the zone to Erudin, all the way to near the river, but have't yet seen them on the other side of the River.
▲ Page top
Level Part 3
QuoteReply
# Jul 11 2001 at 10:23 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
They con blue to my 25th level Bard.
▲ Page top
a funny thing
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2001 at 11:13 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755277592
2 posts
I was wondering around lost once in Toxx when invis wore off. 2 blues and a green jumped me (I was low lvl at the time) I was wondering what do to since tings were not lookin so good when the emissary sautnered up and killed them all. Also I caned amibail to her which I never figured out because I am indifferent in Erudin.

Layat
▲ Page top
where do they spawn?
QuoteReply
# Sep 20 2000 at 4:47 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
i was wondering where these emissary spawn... or if they can appear anywhere... plz help me!!!

Eyeneken Greusbier 20 cleric
▲ Page top
Quest
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2000 at 1:48 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
If you turn in her quest you get an item which has 5 charges of spirit of cat...also, you get the quest for creot's head, which yields a 3sta, 5dex, 5ac no drop lore bracer...kinda nice item, but not that great at the lvl you can solo creot...i just give the heads to newbs and show them how to do the quest.
▲ Page top
Heads
QuoteReply
# Aug 03 2000 at 12:47 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The heads that they drop are for a quest on Kerra Isle. While I was talking to one of the Kerrans they mentioned that they wanted the head of an Emissary, Personally don't want to mess up faction with erudites so I didn't do the quest.
▲ Page top
Faction
QuoteReply
# Jul 27 2000 at 8:01 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Killing one of these wasn't a problem at 24, but they hit up to the low 40s and can kick. Don't always drop the head, but do drop bronze. Factions: -HighGuardofErudin, -HighCouncilofErudin, +Heretics, +Kerra
▲ Page top
Emissary Head
QuoteReply
# Jul 24 2000 at 6:36 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Any one know what the Emissary head is for? And or what Sentinel Creot's Head is for. Both are no drop and Creot's is lore as well.
▲ Page top
RE: Emissary Head
QuoteReply
# Nov 01 2000 at 7:47 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The Emissary's head is for the Kejaar Totem quest, give the head to Shazad Asad on Kerra Island.
▲ Page top
RE: Emissary Head
QuoteReply
# Aug 31 2000 at 6:58 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Does killing this npc make you KOS to the Erudites?
▲ Page top
RE: Emissary Head
QuoteReply
# Jul 29 2001 at 6:44 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756701976
57 posts
yes
faction hits are:
highguard of erudin worse
highcouncil of erudin worse
heretics better
merchants of erudin worse
kerra better
▲ Page top
Emiss's
QuoteReply
# Jul 19 2000 at 5:13 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Been killing them as well. They lower factions with Erudin, High Council of Erudin, etc. Raises faction with Heretics and Kerra. They do not cast at all, there is also some male ones wandering around.
▲ Page top
r these agressive
QuoteReply
# Jul 16 2000 at 6:18 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
are these so called monsters agressive it looks like a normal npc is it a necromancer or something

# Jun 29 2000 at 3:53 AM Rating: Decent

Anonymous
They can also be 22, they con yellow to 21.

These aren't just 21. They con even at 20.
